status.description: Final execution status of the pipeline.

draft_directory.description: Path to the generated draft elements (e.g., ./GrantDraftElements/).

final_deliverable_path.description: Path to the assembled final grant document.

review_log_path.description: Path to the peer review log.

ungrounded_claims_present.description: True if any claims could not be grounded with citations.

retracted_citations_flagged.description: List of any retracted citations detected.
